title: erythroxylum minutifolium
intro: Erythroxylum minutifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly known as the minute-leafed coca. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erythroxylum minutifolium include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and boost energy levels. Erythroxylum minutifolium is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in capsules or powder form, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
